ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Dischage And An Accounting For Funds Received From March 31, 2012
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Dischage And An Accounting For Funds Received From March 31, 2012
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Continued To Feb-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for the Minor in the related Guardianship case (PGN-10-293766). John Streett for and with Ligaya Simbulan (Administrator).

Mr. Streett addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to request for reimbursement, proper estate expenses, allocation of expenses in the Guardianship and distribution of the vehicle to the Guardianship. He further stated that the Estate has several properties but it does not have enough funds to cover the fees and expenses. The accounting in the Guardianship is due on November 6, 2012. They have $245,937 in a blocked account and Bond in the amount of $85,000.00 in the Guardianship. The Administrator stated she has a hard time management the properties. The First Accounting is taken under submission. Status on dischage and an accounting for funds received from March 31, 2012 is set on January 23, 2013. The Court encourged the parties to work on how to allocate the expenses and to consider hiring a property manager to assist the Guardian. The Court ordered an additional bond in the amount of $185,000.00 in the Guardianship (PGN-10-293733) and set status for filing of additional bond on November 6, 2012 in the Guardianship case. Mr. Streett will prepare an order to increase bond.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Chien.
